data.title: PI introduces miniaturized alignment engine platform for faster PIC wafer testing with parallel piezo aligners.
data.description: Cutting-edge technology developed by PI (Physik Instrumente) in San Francisco is revolutionizing PIC wafer testing. The innovative platform features parallel piezo aligners and fly height sensors, allowing for rapid validation of electrical and optical device functions. Introduced on January 21, 2026, this advancement promises faster testing processes, with significant improvements in speed and accuracy.

data.title: Hoth Therapeutics receives Chinese patent for HT-KIT cancer technology, expanding global IP in large oncology market.
data.description: Hoth Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, recently announced the approval of a Chinese patent for their HT-KIT technology, aimed at inducing apoptosis in cancer cells. This move expands their protection in the global oncology market, one of the largest in the world. The news was made public on January 21, 2026, as the company secures its intellectual property rights for this innovative technology. Hoth Therapeutics continues to make strides in the field of oncology with this significant development.

data.title: PFG Holding Corp wins bid in foreclosure auction for Pro Farm Group Inc's assets on Jan 20, 2026. Transaction to close on Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: A company based in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey, PFG Holding Corporation, revealed its winning bid at the auction held on January 20, 2026, to acquire the assets of Pro Farm Group, Inc. The closing of this acquisition is scheduled for February 18, 2026.

data.title: Red Robin launches Big YUMMM® Deals value menu starting at $9.99, includes everyday drink deals. Available from Jan. 26.
data.description: Red Robin Gourmet Burgers, Inc. is set to increase its menu options and introduce new daily drink promotions from January 26, 2026. Located in ENGLEWOOD, Colo., the company (NASDAQ: RRGB) aims to provide its customers with greater affordability by expanding its value menu. This move will offer patrons more choices for dining at lower prices. The enhanced menu will cater to a wide range of tastes and preferences, ensuring more options for a diverse customer base. The introduction of everyday drink deals complements this initiative, providing additional savings and a more enjoyable dining experience. Visit Red Robin soon to take advantage of these exciting changes and indulge in their delicious offerings at budget-friendly prices.

data.title: MUFG integrates Komgo's Konsole APIs, enhancing trade finance workflows in the Americas. Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, MUFG, a prominent financial institution facilitating trade finance in the U.S. and throughout the Americas, unveiled its incorporation of Konsole as a digital multi-bank channel. This integration allows direct connectivity to MUFG Bank, Ltd.'s back-office systems.

data.title: Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) announces $0.12 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 6, 2026.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) disclosed a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share for its common stock. This dividend will be distributed on March 6, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by February 13, 2026. MTI is a distinguished specialty minerals company known for its technological advancements.

data.title: Inovalon integrates with AlayaCare to streamline nursing coordination & billing for pharmacies. Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: Inovalon, a prominent data and solutions provider in healthcare, revealed on January 21, 2026 from Bowie, Maryland, an innovative API-based integration linking ScriptMed® with AlayaCare. This integration aims to improve patient care, nurse scheduling, and revenue cycle management.

data.title: Crystalys Therapeutics appoints Justin Thacker as CFO to aid Phase 3 trials of Dotinurad in gout treatment.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in San Diego, Crystalys Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed the appointment of Justin Thacker as part of their initiative to cater to the medical requirements of individuals affected by gout. Crystalys, a company in the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical sector, aims to address the pressing needs of those living with gout. This move signifies a step towards fulfilling their objectives in this field.

data.title: Nomination Committee of Sandvik AB proposes re-election of 8 Board members for 2026 AGM, including Johan Molin.
data.description: In a statement released on Jan. 21, 2026, the Nomination Committee of Sandvik AB has recommended the re-election of the current Board members. The proposed members for re-election are Claes Boustedt, Marika Fredriksson, Johan Molin, Andreas Nordbrandt, Susanna Schneeberger, Helena Stjernholm, Stefan Widing, and Kai Wärn. Among them, Johan Molin is highlighted in the proposal.

data.title: Kidneys for Communities recognized by Philadelphia Eagles Community RedZone Program at Jan. 4 game, supporting kidney transplants.
data.description: In Philadelphia on January 21, 2026, Kidneys for Communities, a national nonprofit focused on enhancing access to life-saving kidney transplants via community-based living donation, was acknowledged at a Philadelphia Eagles game as a highlighted partner.

data.title: Global Zinc Borate industry report with market trends 2019-2024 & forecast to 2029 added by ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A report on Zinc Borate (CAS 1332-07-6) has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com, focusing on the industry research up to 2025, global and regional market trends from 2019 to 2024, and forecast expectations until 2029. The report covers various aspects of Zinc borate, such as general information, synonyms, chemical composition, safety measures, hazards, handling instructions, storage guidelines, as well as toxicological and ecological information. Additionally, it includes transport details. This detailed analysis is a crucial source for gaining insights into the Zinc Borate industry.

data.title: Meta's stock is slumping in 2026 despite strong digital ad market. Analysts fear risk from AI spend in Q4 results.
data.description: Financial analysts specializing in Meta stocks have indicated that the digital advertising sector continues to perform well, yet there are concerns about the social media company's fourth quarter (Q4) results due to an increase in spending on artificial intelligence (AI). The Q4 financial performance of Meta is predicted to decline in 2026. According to Wall Street experts, Meta's performance in the upcoming quarter is something to watch closely.

data.title: Halliburton stock surged over 13% in 2026, overshadowing Venezuela concerns. SLB to report earnings soon.
data.description: Halliburton has experienced a considerable 13% increase in the 2026 stock market. Another significant oilfield service player, SLB, is set to announce its earnings on Friday. Halliburton, a major player in the S&P 500, has surpassed earnings expectations. Despite this, the major focus remains on the ongoing developments in Venezuela. Investors are closely watching Halliburton's performance amidst this environment of geopolitical uncertainty.

data.title: Investors chase equity in startups like OpenAI and SpaceX in private markets as IPOs lag.AnimationsModule include OpenAI, SpaceX, and NVIDIA.
data.description: Investor interest in private markets is on the rise, with a surge in demand for stakes in popular startups such as OpenAI and SpaceX. This trend comes as initial public offerings (IPOs) are limited in availability. Investors are keen on capturing equity in innovative companies like these, aiming to replicate the success of leading technology company Nvidia. The heightened demand for shares in OpenAI and SpaceX highlights the flourishing private markets, where investors are actively seeking opportunities.
